name: unnamed
comment: Constants defining the waypoint indices for splitting the parent order into child orders. The parent order's waypoints are divided into two groups: - The first child order includes waypoints at indices 0 and 1 (startIndexChild1 to endIndexChild1). - The second child order includes waypoints at indices 2 and 3 (startIndexChild2 to endIndexChild2). This division ensures that each child order has exactly two waypoints.

name: unnamed
comment: Constants to improve readability and maintainability

Multiple Origins: Fails to select roads that exceed the maximum number of departure points
Multiple origins: Failed to choose the destination road
Multiple origins: Route navigation processing timeout
Multiple origins: Impassable due to traffic obstruction around the starting point
Multiple origins: Impassable due to concealed information (traffic obstruction) around the destination
Multiple origins: Outside the directions radius set by the origin
Multiple destinations: Failure to choose the starting point road
Multiple destinations: Failed to choose a destination road
Multi-destination: Route navigation fails due to exceeding the maximum number of destinations
Multi-destination: Outside the directions radius set by the destination
basePendingOrderSelect
values.value:
`
		SELECT u.PhoneNumber CustomerPhoneNumber,
			   o.ID as OrderRequestID,
			   o.ParentID, 
			   o.GroupTypeCD,
			   wc.ContactNo as StartWaypointContact
		FROM gogovan.orderrequest o
		JOIN gogovan.user u 
		  ON u.ID = o.UserID 
		 AND u.DeletedAt is null
		JOIN gogovan.orderflag f 
		  ON f.OrderRequestID = o.ID
		LEFT JOIN waypoint w 
		  ON w.OrderRequestID = o.ID 
		 AND w.Arrangement = 1 
		 AND w.DeletedAt IS NULL
		LEFT JOIN waypointcontact wc 
		  ON wc.WaypointID = w.ID 
		 AND wc.DeletedAt IS NULL
	`
